quote.text: Getting over a painful experience is much like crossing monkey bars. You have to let go at some point in order to move forward.
quote.author: Unknown

history.text: Getting over a painful experience is much like crossing monkey bars. You have to let go at some point in order to move forward.
history.author: Unknown

history.text: If you care about someone enough, you'll always be there for them no matter what.
history.author: Roy T. Bennett
